findings.title: Privacy Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling or consent mechanisms. Further investigation is required to ensure compliance with data handling policies.
assumptions: The identified keywords may indicate underlying privacy issues.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough review of data handling practices to ensure compliance with privacy policies.

findings.title: Critical Push Notification Delivery Issues on Android 14
findings.description: Push notifications are failing to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting 8% of users. This is a critical issue that needs to be resolved to ensure reliable notification delivery.
assumptions: The failure rate is consistent across affected devices.

evidence.excerpt: Push notifications are failing to deliver on Android 14 devices.

recommendations: Resolve silent failures in push notifications for Android 14 users.

findings.title: High Pricing Sensitivity Risk
findings.description: SmartNotify's pricing is positioned lower than competitors, but pricing remains a critical risk factor as competitors may adjust their pricing strategies, potentially impacting market competitiveness.
assumptions: Competitors may change their pricing strategies.

evidence.excerpt: SmartNotify's pricing is positioned lower than PushFlow.

recommendations: Monitor competitor pricing strategies and adjust SmartNotify's pricing accordingly.

findings.title: Accessibility Concerns in Notification Center
findings.description: There are significant accessibility issues reported by users, particularly those using screen readers and colorblind individuals. This indicates a need for improved design to ensure all users can effectively navigate the notification center.

evidence.excerpt: Significant accessibility issues reported by users.

recommendations: Improve the design of the notification center to enhance accessibility.

metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk Hotspot Detected
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicating potential issues with GDPR, CCPA, or other regulatory requirements. Further assessment is needed to ensure compliance with applicable laws.
assumptions: The identified keywords may indicate underlying compliance issues.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 2 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a compliance review to ensure adherence to GDPR, CCPA, and other regulations.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 2 compliance, 1 privacy, 1 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 1 warnings).
